images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a single operations engineer seated at a console, one hand on the keyboard, a glowing cream automation pipeline flowing from their screen directly into a physical server rack beside them — the same person who writes it also runs it, a closed ownership loop. A small red alert light glowing on the desk. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent only — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
